title: dryopteris gongylodes
intro: Dryopteris gongylodes, also known as the Chinese shield fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris gongylodes include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
